pricing_alerts.signal: running 2-for-$14 wing deal on Thursdays — capturing late-night crowd
pricing_alerts.recommended_action: Counter with Thursday-only $1 baklava add-on promo
pricing_alerts.financial_note: Estimated 12% Thursday traffic loss without response

pricing_alerts.signal: $6 footlong sub promo through month end — aggressively underpricing
pricing_alerts.recommended_action: Marathon's differentiation is quality/variety — no need to match
pricing_alerts.financial_note: Subway targets different segment, low overlap risk

temporal_alerts.window: Lunch rush window — monitor queue depth
temporal_alerts.recommended_action: Add one cook to Thursday 10PM-2AM shift

market_events: Cooking oil futures up 4% this week on crop report
Greek feta import tariff review in progress — monitor for Q3 impact
USDA: chicken breast prices stabilizing after Q1 spike

replies.author: GreekFoodLover
replies.text: Fatima's shawarma is unreal. Came back three Fridays in a row just for that. Marathon is a gem.

replies.author: NightOwlUMD
replies.text: Food is great but had a cold gyro once — felt like it sat too long. Staff was apologetic though.

replies.author: TerpFan2024
replies.text: Best late-night spot near UMD. The gyro is massive and the staff is super fast after midnight.

replies.author: BudgetStudentEats
replies.text: $14 for a gyro wrap seems steep vs Chipotle at $11 nearby. Worth it for the taste but the gap is growing.

shelf.staffing_note: Lunch rush window — monitor queue depth
